entries.definition:
ʿ–w–m year, to hire on a yearly basis; to swim, to float and to
run fast. Of this root, two forms occur nine times in the Qur’an:
عَام ʿām eight times and عَامَيْن ʿāmayn once.

عَام ʿām [n. dual. عَامَيْن ʿāmayn] a year (29:14) فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا

655
